list.txt: - Ótima estadia, quarto confortável (só o banheiro é pequeno) e limpo, café da manhã bom. A localização é muito boa e segura, dá para fazer quase tudo caminhando e tem estações de metrô próximo.
- 建物は美しく、共用部分、室内も清潔でした。レトロなエレベーターも素敵です。 朝ごはんも美味しいですが、近くに美味しそうなお店もたくさんありました。 コインランドリーも近くにあります。 部屋が古いので、上の階や隣の声や水音はしましたがそれ以外は静かでした。 かなりおすすめのお宿です。
- 建物は美しく、共用部分、室内も清潔でした。レトロなエレベーターも素敵です。 朝ごはんも美味しいですが、近くに美味しそうなお店もたくさんありました。 コインランドリーも近くにあります。 部屋が古いので、上の階や隣の声や水音はしましたがそれ以外は静かでした。 かなりおすすめのお宿です。
- Hostal formidable ! Les chambres vous transporte dans un autre temps ! Je recommande à 100%.
- 地點方便 房間舒適 早餐環境佳 建築物本身迷人～
- 提前入住了 房东很热情

- Siamo stati ospiti in questa ottima struttura situata in un meraviglioso palazzo storico: la stanza era pulitissima e ben curata, così come il bagno. La posizione è davvero strategica: ci si poteva facilmente spostare a piedi per raggiungere il centro in pochi minuti. Le persone dello staff si sono dimostrate sempre cordiali e disponibili. Lo consigliamo vivamente!

- Súper buena ubicación. Un poco pequeño para 3 personas pero justo y necesario para lo que se necesitaba. Limpio. Además tiene un área de cocina, donde tienen refri, cocina, agua filtrada y café. Además que es súper seguro Lo recomendaría!!
- Very nice place to stay in Barcelona! Absolutely loved the room and views from balcony. It is also very walkable to the center.
- 步行到商圈十分钟 很方便
- I had a pleasant stay and the room was super clean! Thanks so much.
- Everything about my stay met or exceeded expectations. Location, accommodation, cleanliness, comfort and hospitality were all 5 star. I’d happily stay again.
- Enjoyed my stay at hostel girona!
- Good price, great location for skateboarding, nice host!
- Will be coming back!
- Lóistín deas lárnach i mBarcelona ar phraghas réasúnta. Bricfeasta maith saor in aisce, foireann chairdiúil.
- Increíble estadía! El lugar es muy hermoso e identico a las fotos. Volveremos!
- Herşey söylendiği gibiydi.Çok merkezi biryerde.Çok temiz. Sessiz.
- Very pleased with my stay, would definitely recommend!

- Starting with the location, Hostal Girona, is in a quiet street, there are restaurants, markets and all sorts of shops around. You can walk to all the most important attractions or make use of the public transport links available. The building is very charming and being an old-style construction you will find high ceilings, mosaic floors and ample spaces. The room that we were in had a wonderful balcony facing the back courtyard and it was amazing to see the balconies from all the surrounding buildings lit up when dark felt. It was extremely quiet overnight as well, so our sleep was very good during the whole duration of our stay. The staff was also very friendly and with great smiles and keen to assist at any time. They gave us an additional blanket, which was very kind of them. During the day you can sit in the main area where you can have a tea or coffee, look out of the windows and even socialise with other guests. Hostal Girona is definitely a place to consider in Barcelona. 10/10
- Great place in a beautiful location with lots to do near by. The host was very kind, communicative and flexible. Will definitely be staying here again next time I’m in the city.
- Tudo foi perfeito! Acomodação e atendimento excelente em uma aérea incrível de Barcelona. Hotel e equipe 6 estrelas.

- Rezervasyon için geç kaldığımızdan dolayı biraz fazla ödeme yaptık ama otel hem merkezdeydi hem de yürüme olarak bir çok yere yakındı. Giriş ve çıkışlarda kapı şifresi olduğu için istediğimiz saatte giriş çıkış yapabildik. Odalar küçük ama temizdi. Kahvaltı güzeldi. Tavsiye ederim :)

- great 19th century hotel, historical stairway, elevator, doors, flooring. Love the variety of breakfast they provide. Lot of very walkable shops, restaurants, and bars. Barcelona Cathedral (15 min) and Sagrada Familia (25 min) are within walking distance. Receptionists were very friendly and helpful
- In the photos, it looked a bit small, but everyone else was friendly and smiling. Its location was within walking distance to everywhere
- Polecam! Super miejsce.
- Konaklama yeri oldukça merkezi ve güvenli bir lokasyonda bulunuyor. Oda çok temiz ve kahvaltı güzel ve aile ortamı mevcut. Biz memnun kaldık, tavsiye ederiz.

Мястото е не само красиво, но и поддържано с невероятно внимание към детайла — чисто, уютно и с атмосфера, която те кара да се чувстваш като у дома си още от първата минута. Въпреки че не успях да се видя с Лоренцо, това по никакъв начин не намали удоволствието ми от престоя. Напротив — мястото само по себе си остави толкова силно положително впечатление, че бих се върнала отново без колебание. Girona 24 е от онези локации, които съчетават комфорт, стил и спокойствие по най-естествения начин. Препоръчвам го с две ръце на всеки, който търси качествено и приятно място в Барселона.
- Una grata experiencia todo muy cerca, el cuarto y el baño muy limpios, y la cama muy cómoda.
- Great quiet place to stay in the centre of Barcelona.
- Wunderschönes Zimmer inkl. Balkon. Selbst das geteilte Bad war wunderschön und je nach Gäste auch stets sauber. Top Service beim Check-in.
- Un piccolo incidente con lo scarico dell'acqua ci ha causato qualche problema. Ma alla receptions hanno subito provveduto a risolvere il problema Il resto tutto fantastico
- とても快適な時間を過ごすことができました。特に朝食の美味しさ、24時間利用できるカフェ類は素晴らしかったです。

- The hostel is located In a very nice neighborhood, I suggest you rent a bicycle and then you can easily go around and visit other neighborhoods as well. The cafes, restaurants and bars in this neighborhood are already very good and you don`t need to go always far away to get nice food. The only 4/5 thing for me was the shared toilets. They were definitely clean, but I wish there were more hygiene detergents including sanitizer there. The breakfast is also amazing, but stays the same across all days, at least for 5 days that we stayed. so it might get slightly repetitive if you stay for a long period. all in all, I believe the hostel definitely worth to visit.
- It was amazing!

- We thoroughly enjoyed the stay at this location in Barcelona. It was close to a metro stop and easy to get in and around. It is also walkable to the Plaça Catalunya and the top end of Las Ramblas. The whole hostel had a very chill vibe and the breakfast was excellent. Would stay here again!
- Excellent! Beau bâtiment, magnifique chambre, l’environnement est au top. Je reviendrai les yeux fermés

- Emplacement vraiment pratique, près des principales activités touristiques de Barcelone. Chambre charmante, donnant sur la cour intérieure et calme. Petit déjeuner correct. Très pratique aussi de pouvoir utiliser la salle principale pour se faire un café ou réchauffer un plat. Accueil réactif
- Bei dem leider nur eintägigen Aufenthalt haben wir einen bleibenden Eindruck von der Stadt mitgenommen.

- Hostal Girona er virkelig hyggeligt og indbydende. Det ligger i en gammel bygning, og der er virkelig kælet for detaljerne i forhold til at holde stilen i indretningen. Morgenmaden er rigtig god, det er muligt at få te og kaffe og at opbevare sin egen mad i et fælles køleskab. Det var intet problem at dele toilet og bad med de øvrige gæster, der var rent og pænt. Der er meget lydt i bygningen, som man også kan læse i andre anmeldelser. Vi boede ud til Carrer de Girona, og man kan tydeligt høre både trafik og naboer. Vi brugte ørepropper om natten, og det gik helt fint, men hvis man er meget støjfølsom, skal man måske revurdere, om det er her, man skal bo. Tak for et rigtigt godt ophold!

Just lovely - The building is lovely. My room was wide with a huge size double bed. Shower in the room which works great being toilets in common but to have a shower for yourself. Very comfortable historic hotel with super staff in good location - The free breakfast was very good, and coffee was available at other times. Since the hotel is part of a historic building with private residences, it was very quiet for sleeping. The staff was friendly, extremely knowledgeable and helpful. They not only called a taxi to the airport for me, but the taxi company called back and confirmed the taxi had arrived before I went down to meet it. The location is very good for going either to the Old Town, La Rambla or the University area. The address and entrance to the hotel are not easy to find after dark. Do not hesitate to use the light of your phone to show clearly which unit number one should press for the hotel. As warned, the antique lift is somewhat temperamental, Do be SURE that the metal outer door does fully close.

Ottimo - Consigliatissimo per chi vuole visitare Barcellona poiché la posizione é strategica per tutte le attrazioni della cittá. Absolutely charming and totally worth the price - The room was way more beautiful in life than it is on the pictures! It’s bright, stylish, and cozy, the balcony with a bathtub was amazing, I literally felt in a movie. Everything everywhere in the hotel was super clean and in a great condition, and a very pleasant little detail — it smelled amazing everywhere, and I complimented the stuff about the smell so many times they shared a bottle of the interior perfume they use with me. This is peak hospitality:) Also the location is amazing, there are many restaurants and bars in the neighbourhood and a beautiful park, but the area around the hotel is quiet and calm. And the hotel has a big shared fridge with a dining area and free utensils, so you can go to mercadona (2 min away) and fix yourself a nice breakfast/lunch with anything that doesn’t require much cooking. The stuff were all very responsive and welcoming! The only downside was the occasional noise from the neighbouring rooms and from upstairs, which is unavoidable in an old building like that (and generally in Spain, since the walls are usually pretty thin).

Lugar práctico y encantador - Nos encantó la ubicación, muy cerca de Plaza Cataluña y del bus que va directo al aeropuerto. Nos quedamos en la habitación con balcón, que es preciosa, con un techo muy alto y unas vistas encantadoras. Tanto la atención del personal como las zonas comunes son también muy acogedoras, tienen microondas y puedes traer tu propia comida (hay un súper justo debajo). Tanto el edificio como el hotel tienen muchos años de antigüedad y conservan el encanto de otra época. El hotel es perfecto y lo recomendamos sin duda. El ascensor es antiguo, lo cual es muy original, pero tiene sus fallos. Si alguien deja la puerta sin cerrar no puede bajar o subir cuando se llama, así que te ves obligado a utilizar las escaleras.
- Un hostal de 10! Limpio y cómodo. Muy céntrico y el desayuno excepcional!!!! Mucho donde elegir y muy variado. Totalmente recomendable. Me lo apunto para próximas visitas.

좋아요. - 위치도 좋았고 깨끗했고 호텔과 다른, 엘리베이터나 건물 등 옛 스페인 스러운 곳에서 묵어보고 싶어서 선택했던건데 좋았습니다. 조식은 먹지 않았지만 조식이 나오는 공용 공간에 있는 커피 머신을 24시간 언제든지 사용할 수 있어서 너무 좋았어요!(커피 맛있어요ㅠㅠ) 곡용 공간에 냉장고에 아침으로 먹을 것을 미리 넣어뒀다가 오전에 먹기도, 미리 맥주를 넣어뒀다가 저녁에 시원하게 먹기도 편했어요. 공용 공간에는 그 외에 전자렌지랑 정수기도 있습니다. 전 전혀 못느꼈는데, 같이 방을 사용한 파트너는 키가 커서 그런지 샤워실이 조금 좁다고 느낀 것 같았어요. 난방도 히터기를 트니 금방 따뜻해지고 좋았어요. 도착할 때 공항 버스를 타고 갔는데 15분 정도 도보로 도착할 수 있어요. 근처 왠만한 곳들은 20분 정도면 도보로 도착 할 수 있어서 위치도 좋았습니다. 첫날 너무 일찍 도착하게 돼서 짐부터 맡겨두고 시티를 둘러보다가 들어와서 방을 받았는데 짐을 맡아주셔서 좋았어요. 찍지는 못했는데 저희 방은 방 안에 따로 예쁜 테라스가 하나 더 있어서 그 곳에서 저녁에서 맥주 마시고 아침에는 빵과 커피를 먹고 너무 좋았습니다. 직원분들도 친절했어요!

- We stayed here for one night, from January 31 to February 1, and honestly, everything was amazing. We have absolutely nothing to complain about. The room was lovely — clean, cozy and had everything we needed. The building itself is beautiful and full of character, you can really feel the history in it. It was also really quiet—we didn’t hear a sound from the neighbors. Breakfast was delicious. And a special shoutout to the woman at the front desk — so friendly and welcoming.

Great location, charming building, and spotless rooms - Hostel Girona sits in a lovely historic building right in the heart of Barcelona — a location that’s hard to beat. Restaurants, cafés, and shops are everywhere, so you’re never far from good food or a lively street. Our room was on the small side but perfectly adequate for a short stay and came with a charming little patio. Everything was impressively clean — both the room and bathroom were spotless. All in all, a very pleasant stay in a great location. The only surprise was the bed, which turned out to have wheels that weren’t secured. This meant it occasionally decided to explore the room on its own. A slightly adventurous sleeping experience! There’s no parking on site, but the staff can arrange a discounted nearby parking option.

- We would definitely stay at Hostal Girona again- we enjoyed the breakfast, loved our room and felt the location was great for exploring Barcelona and easy to walk to/from the places we wanted to see. Lots of great coffee shops and food nearby. The only inconvenience was that we experienced a few night time disturbances, one evening around 4am we woke up to doors slamming and yelling, and another night we were woken up very early to stomping and (a child?) yelling from upstairs. Though neither of these are the fault of the hostal, it is worth noting that the building can be loud due to other occupants. Overall, we would return, as we felt safe and enjoyed our stay.

Ansonsten würde ich das Hostel definitiv weiterempfehlen, das es Preis-Leistungs-technisch top ist.

Pas mal, mais juste le temps de dormir........................ - La situation géographique de cet "hôtel" . L'accès au métro est facile et on n'est pas loin du centre Plus d'accueil à partir de 21 h ; pas sympa quand le train arrive à 22 h 000.... Aucun signe, , au niveau de la rue, ,signalant qu'à cette adresse, il y a une hôtel Chambre microscopique la seule table de chevet : un rondin de bois : voir photos jointes Quand on rentre dans l'immeuble : - Il faut prendre un ascenseur très vieux - Il faut aller au 2nd étage ; là, aucun signe d'hôtel sauf, devant la porte de gauche, sur le palier, et un paillasson sur lequel est inscrit le nom de l'hôtel. C'est le côté "accueil" , mais pour ouvrir cette porte ordinaire, celle d'un appartement ordinaire, il faut faire un code !!! Mais pour aller dans notre chambre , il fallait faire un code à la porte de droite du même pallier, pour arriver dans un petit couloir desservant 4 ou 5 chambres minuscules . - Dans ce pseudo hôtel, il n'y a aucun endroit pour se relaxer ou faire une pause; et cela ne peut surement pas se faire dans la chambre où ne se trouve qu'une chaise en bois parfaitement inconfortable pour deux !!! - Quant au petit déjeuner, correct, mais sans plus . Le 1er jour, juste 1/2 heure après ouverture du petit déjeuner, il n'y avait déjà plus de croissant .....Les jours suivants, il y avait des croissants, mais de très mauvaise qualité - La télévision de la chambre ne fonctionnait pas !!!!
Moyen, l’expérience ne sera pas renouvelée - Emplacement idéal en plein centre Propreté impeccable Insonorisation inexistante Petit déjeuner correct mais sans éclat (que du basique)

Muy bien Hostel Girona - Hôtel très bien situé, très bon accueil, Petit déjeuner excellent et complet. Juste une suggestion pour la salle de bain, rajouter un petit emplacement ( étagère, planche) afin d'y mettre les affaires de toilette. Merci.

Surpassed my expectations! - Loved the home cooked omelette for breakfast, which was amazing overall, and the cozy area just beyond the dining room. The place has been tastefully decorated without compromising functionality, and the staff were eager to please.
- La localisation, le petit déjeuner est super, les chambres sont spacieuses et bien aménagées Rien
It was wonderful. Nice staff, great breakfast, excellent location - Great location Noise from other rooms or other floors
Très bon hôtel - Tous Rien

Great location, clean and comfortable rooms - Location was the highlight. It was very central, close to most attractions, neighborhood felt safer and easy to navigate. We loved the staff, everyone was nice and helpful. Whole room was very clean. The building was very historical and interesting. Everything was as shown in the pictures. Some suggestions: - Slippers for each guest (there wasn’t a rug in our room and we don’t like to walk around with our shoes on all the time) - Wall hangers for jackets in the room - Small shelf for the shower to put shampoo/shower gel - AC was too loud some nights not that bad but still annoying.

Alojamiento estupendo y desayuno magnífico - La ubicación y la tranquilidad . Sin ruidos La sala del desayuno pequeña para cuando está el alojamiento bastante lleno .

Hôtel très atypique avec une âme et bien situé, petit déjeuner très bien j'y retournerai. - Chambre atypique très belle avec balcon solarium et petit déjeuner excellent Tout est parfait sauf la literie dure

Lovely experience. - Glad to share that we had a lovely stay. We like the staff smiling and greeting us Ohla everytime. The elevator, the cleanliness of the room, the interior and uniqueness of the room. We had our breakfast and our room was immediately cleaned and towels has been changed. We used the big mirror of the door in the balcony as our whole body mirror. Would be nice if they could add that up in the room.
- Todo Falto un cobertor

Loved it for 48 hours visit - Loved the location, loved the vibe - its 1888 house, with amazing details. Next door there is an amazing breakfast/brunch place called Novela, try the Cortado there - its delicious! We did not have a breakfast paid at the hotel, but at the glance it looked amazing so its worth considering. Room was spacious, as we stayed for two nights - the location was perfect, close to the metro stations, but if you have time and want - you can walk anywhere from here. Solo female + teenager - could recommend, we felt safe in the surrounding areas. Zero to none place for toiletries in the bathroom. Only toothbrush and toothpaste can be fit on the sink, the rest - whatever you come up with. Little shelve would go a long way!
A great place to land in the heart of Barcelona but still quiet, clean & nicely furnished. - Location & respect for historical status

- Çalışanlar çok tatlı ve yardımseverdi. Kahvaltısı yeterliydi, biten ürünlerin sürekli yenilerini getirdiler. Mutfağı kullanışlıydı. Çay, kahve ve su istediğiniz zaman mutfaktan alabiliyorsunuz. Biz yanımızda getirdiğimiz konserveleri rahat bir şekilde yiyebildik. Banyo ve çarşaflar temizdi. Konumu merkeze 10-15dk yürüme mesafesindeydi. Tren garı için metroya 5dk yürüme mesafesinde. - Le bâtiment ancien. Et le quartier. J'ai été réveillée a 6h30 par les personnes qui mettent en place le petit déjeuner, sans aucunes discrétion dutout, en parlant fort, en rigolant, en claquant la vaisselle et les portes et en traînant les chaises, aucuns respect dutout pour les clients. Je voulais dormir jusqu'à 9h...impossible a cause de ce personnel très bruyant et bien sûre tout le reste de ma journée a été en parti gâché a cause de ma très courte nuit (couchée a 1h30). - Muy buena ubicación y el personal muy amable; en general el hostal es limpio y bien mantenido. Lamentable los exteriores del hostal, es decir el acceso en el edificio donde se encuentra el hostal no tiene buena presentación y está descuidado. El baño muy pequeño.

I enjoyed it enough to want to stay there again. - The building was beautiful in the way an old Barcelona building can be and this one is very old and historic, I believe. The breakfast room and side room were charming and communal so people chatted wit one another. The hall to my room was beautiful and bright during the day. This hotel is charming. May have not been the best location for me but the neighborhood was friendly.

We enjoyed the hotel and our stay, and can recommend it. - We arrived early from the cruise port and did not expect the room to be available. We stored the luggage and sat in the small lounge area. My friend was very tired and slept on the wooden bench for about an hour. The lady at the front invited us to have coffee and relax. They gave us the first room that became clean and available. The Hotel is located in a neighborhood above a Technical University, it was quiet. Access was via a bell at the huge wooden door and a vintage elevator. The decor was nice, retro like mixed in with modern and vintage furniture. It is bright and clean. We watched the breakfast buffet attendant clean up after breakfast and she was very detail oriented and I could not do better in my own home. Our room was bright and clean, with a small bathroom. Breakfast buffet was good, typical for the region. The chairs and tables in the lounge/dining area are very small. There are no comfortable chairs to lounge in or sit and read a book. A few chairs were low, difficult to get out of for a senior, and we wished for a little more seating comfort. The bathroom in our room flushed very loud with a big bang, would wake one up during the night. We would choose the hotel again for its location, cleanliness, and uniqueness.

Top verblijf in Barcelona - Heerlijk goed, vers ontbijt. Er staat ook een koelkast waar je zelf eten kan bewaren eventueel.
